_provenance: schema-derived from feature-plans/decision-science/phase-1/nn1-spec-freeze-discipline/plan.md D1-D6 + council synthesis §2.5 §3.3 §3.7; no producer-computed values — all fields are named enum constants or structural shape assertions

freeze_disciplines._note: Any value outside honest_set is an NN1 violation. BACKTEST_SELECTION is the standard haircut-inflating violation. OOS is the stricter frozen-eval-peek violation (synthesis §2.5 NN1-VIOLATION hierarchy).

evidence_sources._note: evidence_source='OOS' on a spec_facets row means the facet value was chosen by looking at frozen-eval returns — a stricter violation than BACKTEST_SELECTION.

phase_1_load_bearing_facets._note: CRRA risk-aversion parameter — frozen by theory (synthesis §3.3). Non-negotiable: adding gamma to OPTUNA_SEARCH_SPACE_KEYS is NN1 violation.
CRRA utility family choice — frozen by theory (synthesis §3.3).
Wealth argument derivation — frozen by theory (synthesis §3.3).

_search_space_note: These names must NEVER appear in OPTUNA_SEARCH_SPACE_KEYS. Phase-2 facets (generator_family etc.) are pre-named here as a tripwire (plan D4).

violation_return_shape._note: Violation message names the offending facet. Format: '<facet_name>: <discipline>' for BACKTEST_SELECTION; stricter label for OOS (frozen-eval peek).

validate_search_space_nn1_contract._note: Called at top of run_autotuner BEFORE optuna.create_study. Fail-loud — NN1 violation at this level is unrecoverable.

all_theory_bundle.description: Bundle whose three Phase-1 facets all have freeze_discipline=THEORY
all_theory_bundle._note: autotuner proceeds; S=0 contributes nothing to N_effective haircut

single_backtest_selection_facet._note: Hard fail — autotuner refuses to run (team-lead directive, load-bearing NN1)

mixed_bundle.description: Bundle with some THEORY and some BACKTEST_SELECTION facets
mixed_bundle._note: Even one BACKTEST_SELECTION trips the gate — partial honesty is a fail

oos_evidence_source._note: OOS-peek is a STRICTER violation than BACKTEST_SELECTION — the alarm must label it differently so the user sees the severity gradient

unknown_discipline.description: Bundle with a facet whose freeze_discipline is not in the accepted enum
unknown_discipline._note: Default-deny: any value NOT in NN1_HONEST_DISCIPLINES is treated as a violation (plan risk callout — silent fall-through is forbidden)

no_spec_bundle_pinned.description: run_autotuner called without a pinned spec bundle id (None / missing)
no_spec_bundle_pinned._note: Phase-1 strict: no implicit defaults (plan T4 / team-lead binding)

hash_mismatch.description: Operator-claimed bundle_hash does not match hash computed from its facets_json
hash_mismatch._note: Provenance integrity: a tampered bundle is a corrupt bundle — refuse, do not proceed with silent hash drift

dof_ledger_population.trigger: BACKTEST_SELECTION facets detected at validate_nn1_compliance time
dof_ledger_population._note: Each detected BACKTEST_SELECTION facet is written via insert_dof_ledger_row with evidence_source='BACKTEST_SELECTION'. n_configs_searched must be populated (drives +S in the haircut).
dof_ledger_population._count_note: After writing, count_dof_backtest_selections(spec_bundle_id) must return a value > 0 reflecting the inserted rows' n_configs_searched sum
